summary: Failed (assertion): The hosted production build of the guild screen likely differs from the expected UI state: the trait slider section is either not rendered at all, rendered under different identifiers, or hidden due to a production-only condition (feature flag, responsive breakpoint, missing data/config, or a stale build on Vercel). Since the class buttons and deploy button are present, the page loads, but the trait controls are missing from the DOM, indicating a frontend implementation/conf…
